action_set_definitions.name: get_session_overview
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the session track list to identify IDs for named tracks (e.g., 'Master Bus', 'Drum VCA', 'Sub-Master A').

action_set_definitions.name: get_track_details
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current settings for a specific track, including fader level (dB) and solo-safe status.

track_id.description: The unique identifier for the track.

action_set_definitions.name: get_metering_data
action_set_definitions.description: Provides real-time Peak and RMS values for specified track IDs to check for clipping or gain staging targets.

track_ids.description: List of track IDs to meter.

action_set_definitions.name: update_fader_level
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the fader level of a specific track to a target decibel value.

track_id.description: The unique identifier for the track.

target_db.description: The target gain level in dB.

action_set_definitions.name: set_solo_safe_status
action_set_definitions.description: Enables or disables the Solo Safe mode on a track, ensuring it is not muted when other tracks are soloed.

track_id.description: The unique identifier for the track.

enabled.description: Whether solo safe should be on (true) or off (false).

state_description.tracks: A list of track objects containing volume (dB), pan (-100 to 100), mute status, and solo status.
state_description.master_bus: State of the master output channel including fader level and active inserts.
state_description.transport: Current playback status and playhead location.
state_description.plugins: Map of track IDs to active signal processors and their current parameter states.
